targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    alert_hour AS time,
    sumIf(alert_count, quarter = 0) AS `0`,
    sumIf(alert_count, quarter = 1) AS `15`,
    sumIf(alert_count, quarter = 2) AS `30`,
    sumIf(alert_count, quarter = 3) AS `45`
FROM (
    SELECT
        toStartOfHour(time_bucket) AS alert_hour,
        intDiv(toMinute(time_bucket), 15) AS quarter,
        sum(alert_count) AS alert_count
    FROM alerts_1m
    WHERE time_bucket >= toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY)
      AND time_bucket <= now()
    GROUP BY alert_hour, quarter
) AS subquery
GROUP BY alert_hour
ORDER BY alert_hour
WITH FILL
FROM toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY)
TO toStartOfHour(now())
STEP toIntervalHour(1);

SELECT
    concat(toString(row_number() OVER (ORDER BY alert_count DESC, src_ip ASC)), '.') AS "Rank",
    src_ip AS "Client IP address",
    alert_count AS "# Alerts",
    ifNull(total_requests, 0) AS "# Total Requests"
FROM (
    SELECT src_ip, count() AS alert_count
    FROM alerts
    WHERE alert_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND alert_timestamp <= $__toTime
    GROUP BY src_ip
) AS alert_counts
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT src_ip, count() AS total_requests
    FROM loglines
    GROUP BY src_ip
) AS request_counts USING src_ip
ORDER BY alert_count DESC, src_ip ASC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT
    time_bucket AS timestamp,
    avgMerge(avg_count) AS " "
FROM fill_levels_1m
WHERE stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND entry_type = 'total_loglines'
  AND 'Prefilter' IN (${include_modules:csv})
  AND time_bucket >= $__fromTime AND time_bucket <= $__toTime
GROUP BY time_bucket
ORDER BY time_bucket ASC;

SELECT
    time_bucket AS timestamp,
    avgMerge(avg_count) AS " "
FROM fill_levels_1m
WHERE stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND entry_type = 'total_loglines'
  AND 'Inspector' IN (${include_modules:csv})
  AND time_bucket >= $__fromTime AND time_bucket <= $__toTime
GROUP BY time_bucket
ORDER BY time_bucket ASC;

SELECT
    time_bucket AS timestamp,
    avgMerge(avg_count) AS " "
FROM fill_levels_1m
WHERE stage = 'data_analysis.detector'
  AND entry_type = 'total_loglines'
  AND 'Detector' IN (${include_modules:csv})
  AND time_bucket >= $__fromTime AND time_bucket <= $__toTime
GROUP BY time_bucket
ORDER BY time_bucket ASC;

SELECT
    time_bucket AS timestamp,
    avgMerge(avg_count) AS " "
FROM fill_levels_1m
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.batch_handler'
  AND entry_type = 'total_loglines_in_batches'
  AND 'BatchHandler' IN (${include_modules:csv})
  AND time_bucket >= $__fromTime AND time_bucket <= $__toTime
GROUP BY time_bucket
ORDER BY time_bucket ASC;

SELECT *
FROM (
  SELECT 'BatchHandler' AS name, quantileTDigestMerge(0.5)(median_count) AS "Median", 3 AS sort_order
  FROM fill_levels_1m
  WHERE stage = 'log_collection.batch_handler' AND entry_type = 'total_loglines_in_batches'
    AND time_bucket >= $__fromTime AND time_bucket <= $__toTime

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'Prefilter' AS name, quantileTDigestMerge(0.5)(median_count) AS "Median", 4 AS sort_order
  FROM fill_levels_1m
  WHERE stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter' AND entry_type = 'total_loglines'
    AND time_bucket >= $__fromTime AND time_bucket <= $__toTime

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'Inspector' AS name, quantileTDigestMerge(0.5)(median_count) AS "Median", 5 AS sort_order
  FROM fill_levels_1m
  WHERE stage = 'data_inspection.inspector' AND entry_type = 'total_loglines'
    AND time_bucket >= $__fromTime AND time_bucket <= $__toTime

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'Detector' AS name, quantileTDigestMerge(0.5)(median_count) AS "Median", 6 AS sort_order
  FROM fill_levels_1m
  WHERE stage = 'data_analysis.detector' AND entry_type = 'total_loglines'
    AND time_bucket >= $__fromTime AND time_bucket <= $__toTime
)
WHERE name IN (${include_modules:csv})
ORDER BY sort_order ASC;

SELECT *
FROM (
SELECT 'LogServer' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM (
    SELECT
        sl.message_id AS message_id,
        toDate(slt.event_timestamp) AS event_date,
        sl.timestamp_in AS start_timestamp,
        slt.event_timestamp AS end_timestamp,
        dateDiff('microsecond', sl.timestamp_in, slt.event_timestamp) AS latency_us
    FROM server_logs sl
    INNER JOIN server_logs_timestamps slt ON sl.message_id = slt.message_id
    WHERE slt.event = 'timestamp_out'
      AND slt.event_timestamp > sl.timestamp_in
) AS server_log_latency_values
WHERE event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Collector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM logline_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.collector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'BatchHandler' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM logline_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.batch_handler'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Prefilter' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Inspector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Detector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM suspicious_batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'data_analysis.detector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
)
WHERE name IN (${include_modules:csv});

SELECT 'Data analysis phase' AS name, sum(median) AS median
FROM (
SELECT 'Inspector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Detector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM suspicious_batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'data_analysis.detector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
)

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Data preparation phase' AS name, sum(median) AS median
FROM (
SELECT 'LogServer' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM (
    SELECT
        sl.message_id AS message_id,
        toDate(slt.event_timestamp) AS event_date,
        sl.timestamp_in AS start_timestamp,
        slt.event_timestamp AS end_timestamp,
        dateDiff('microsecond', sl.timestamp_in, slt.event_timestamp) AS latency_us
    FROM server_logs sl
    INNER JOIN server_logs_timestamps slt ON sl.message_id = slt.message_id
    WHERE slt.event = 'timestamp_out'
      AND slt.event_timestamp > sl.timestamp_in
) AS server_log_latency_values
WHERE event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'LogCollector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM logline_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.collector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'BatchHandler' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM logline_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.batch_handler'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Prefilter' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
);

SELECT 'Including transport and wait time' AS name, sum(median) AS median
FROM (
SELECT 'LogServer' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM (
    SELECT
        sl.message_id AS message_id,
        toDate(slt.event_timestamp) AS event_date,
        sl.timestamp_in AS start_timestamp,
        slt.event_timestamp AS end_timestamp,
        dateDiff('microsecond', sl.timestamp_in, slt.event_timestamp) AS latency_us
    FROM server_logs sl
    INNER JOIN server_logs_timestamps slt ON sl.message_id = slt.message_id
    WHERE slt.event = 'timestamp_out'
      AND slt.event_timestamp > sl.timestamp_in
) AS server_log_latency_values
WHERE event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'LogCollection' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM logline_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.collector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'BatchHandler' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM logline_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.batch_handler'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Prefilter' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Inspector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Detector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM suspicious_batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'data_analysis.detector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Between BatchHandler and Prefilter' AS name, if(isFinite(median(value)), median(value), 0) AS median
FROM (
      SELECT dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) AS value
      FROM batch_tree bt1
      INNER JOIN batch_tree bt2
              ON bt1.batch_row_id = bt2.parent_batch_row_id
      WHERE bt1.stage = 'log_collection.batch_handler'
        AND bt1.status = 'completed'
        AND bt2.stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
        AND bt2.status = 'in_process'
        AND bt1.timestamp >= $__fromTime
        AND bt2.timestamp <= $__toTime
)

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Between Prefilter and Inspector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(value)), median(value), 0) AS median
FROM (
      SELECT dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) AS value
      FROM batch_tree bt1
      INNER JOIN batch_tree bt2
              ON bt1.batch_row_id = bt2.parent_batch_row_id
      WHERE bt1.stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
        AND bt1.status = 'finished'
        AND bt2.stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
        AND bt2.status = 'in_process'
        AND bt1.timestamp >= $__fromTime
        AND bt2.timestamp <= $__toTime
)

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Between Inspector and Detector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(value)), median(value), 0) AS median
FROM (
      SELECT dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) AS value
      FROM batch_tree bt1
      INNER JOIN batch_tree bt2
              ON bt1.batch_row_id = bt2.parent_batch_row_id
      WHERE bt1.stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
        AND bt1.status = 'finished'
        AND bt2.stage = 'data_analysis.detector'
        AND bt2.status = 'in_process'
        AND bt1.timestamp >= $__fromTime
        AND bt2.timestamp <= $__toTime
      AND dateDiff('microsecond', bt1.timestamp, bt2.timestamp) > 0
)
)

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Excluding transport and wait time' AS name, sum(median) AS median
FROM (
SELECT 'LogServer' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM (
    SELECT
        sl.message_id AS message_id,
        toDate(slt.event_timestamp) AS event_date,
        sl.timestamp_in AS start_timestamp,
        slt.event_timestamp AS end_timestamp,
        dateDiff('microsecond', sl.timestamp_in, slt.event_timestamp) AS latency_us
    FROM server_logs sl

    WHERE slt.event = 'timestamp_out'
      AND slt.event_timestamp > sl.timestamp_in
) AS server_log_latency_values
WHERE event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

WHERE stage = 'log_collection.collector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)

UNION ALL

SELECT 'BatchHandler' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM logline_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_collection.batch_handler'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Prefilter' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'log_filtering.prefilter'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Inspector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'data_inspection.inspector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Detector' AS name, if(isFinite(median(latency_us)), median(latency_us), 0) AS median
FROM suspicious_batch_stage_latency_values
WHERE stage = 'data_analysis.detector'
  AND event_date >= toDate($__fromTime) AND event_date <= toDate($__toTime)
  AND end_timestamp >= $__fromTime AND end_timestamp <= $__toTime
);

list.description: Modules to be included in the comparison graphs and charts
list.label: Modules to include in comparison
list.name: include_modules
list.query: LogServer : 'LogServer', Collector : 'Collector', BatchHandler : 'BatchHandler', Prefilter : 'Prefilter', Inspector : 'Inspector', Detector : 'Detector'
